name: Memory (A-MEM v2)
description: OpenClaw memory plugin implementing A-MEM — memories evolve, not just accumulate. Graph linking, hybrid retrieval, LLM-driven evolution. No Python.

providerEndpoints.note: Local Qdrant vector store for memory embeddings.
Default LLM for note construction / link generation / evolution; override the base URL via AMEM_LLM_BASE_URL.
Alternate LLM when AMEM_LLM_PROVIDER=openai — the OpenAI Chat Completions API, or any compatible gateway (DeepSeek, OpenRouter, Groq, Together, Ollama, vLLM) selected via AMEM_LLM_BASE_URL.

topK.description: Maximum number of memories to retrieve.

collection.description: Qdrant collection name (mode A shared default).

llmProvider.description: LLM API dialect for the engine's own calls. Overridden by AMEM_LLM_PROVIDER.

llmModel.description: Model the engine uses for note construction, linking and evolution. Overridden by AMEM_LLM_MODEL. Defaults to claude-sonnet-4-6 (anthropic) or gpt-4o-mini (openai).

llmBaseURL.description: Base URL for the LLM endpoint, e.g. an OpenAI-compatible gateway. Overridden by AMEM_LLM_BASE_URL. API keys are read from the environment only and cannot be set here.

llmStrongProvider.description: Optional stronger tier: request format. Falls back to llmProvider. Overridden by AMEM_LLM_STRONG_PROVIDER.

llmStrongModel.description: Optional stronger tier: model for the few genuinely hard judgements (merge adjudication, contradiction classification). Falls back to llmModel, so leaving it unset keeps single-model behaviour. Overridden by AMEM_LLM_STRONG_MODEL.

llmStrongBaseURL.description: Optional stronger tier: endpoint. Falls back to llmBaseURL. Set all three strong fields to run the tiers on entirely different backends, e.g. a local Ollama for fast and a hosted API for strong. Overridden by AMEM_LLM_STRONG_BASE_URL.

llmCrudRole.description: Which tier the agent_end CRUD decision runs on. Defaults to fast: it runs every turn, and its destructive failure mode is handled by the update guard rather than by model tier. Overridden by AMEM_LLM_CRUD_ROLE.

crudUpdateMinSim.description: Similarity floor (0-1) for accepting an LLM-chosen CRUD UPDATE target. Below it the fact is stored as a new memory instead of overwriting, so a mis-picked memory is never destroyed. Raise it for cheaper/weaker models. Overridden by AMEM_CRUD_UPDATE_MIN_SIM.
